raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX Macys local store placed an order for a set of sheets for at total of {$330.00}. The final amount was {$320.00} ( applied reward amount of {$10.00} ) It was delivered o XX/XX/XXXX and I received a picture of my house porch that I did not recognized. I contacted Macys immediately when I received the picture saying that it isn't my house. Macys gave me credit of - {$320.00}. When I got home, the item was in my front door ( I did not realized the picture I received was showing sideway ) I contacted Macys immediately and I went on XX/XX/XXXX to return the item right away at the local Macys because it had a stain. I got a receipt showing zero returned to me. That is because at this point there was the original charge ad the credit when I returned the item, so there was no amount offset the return. A few days later, I noticed a {$330.00} on my account. I contacted Macys to let them know that I returned the item and I sent them the return receipt. I've been fighting with Macys XXXX since XX/XX/XXXX. I filed dispute several times. When I receive the letter saying that it was resolved, they charged my credit card for {$330.00} and give me credit for - {$330.00}. 
They never gave me credit for the original charge of {$330.00}. Every single time I file a dispute they keep doing the same thing. They charged me again and then give me credit. And Macys XXXX is overstating what I owe them for {$330.00}. I pay the statement balance and more every single month but I don't and will not pay {$330.00} that they claim I owe. Here are all the charges that appear on my Macys XXXX credit card. I never repurchase the item and Macys XXXX XXXX continues to charge my CC. I provided calculations showing all the transactions, twice now, and the last one was emailed to XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. They keep saying it's resolved but the letters never show a credit. Instead, they show a charge of {$330.00} They charged my XXXX XXXX times and only gave me credit XXXX times. Again, the item was returned and I provided proof by sending copy of the return receipt via email to Macys XXXX dispute department XX/XX/XXXX {$320.00} XX/XX/XXXX - {$320.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$320.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$330.00} XX/XX/XXXX - {$330.00} XX/XX/XXXX - {$330.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$330.00} XX/XX/XXXX - {$330.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$330.00}
